intentSynonyms: look up a document in gdocs
fetch a single document in gdocs
view one specific document in gdocs
get document metadata and tabs in gdocs
description: Get metadata, revision info, and tab details for a Google Doc by ID. If document_id is omitted, the tool reads the document currently open in the editor.

document_id.description: Google Docs document ID. Defaults to the document open in the current editor tab.

tab_id.description: Optional tab ID to mark as the selected tab in the response. Defaults to the current or first tab.
